# How to Write Distraction-Free in WordPress (+2 other tricks)

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2025-09-06 13:30:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 1072

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Struggling to stay focused while writing in WordPress?

You’re not alone.

Menus, sidebars, and plugin notifications can all get in the way
of your words. Instead of finishing a draft, you end up tweaking
settings, adjusting layouts, or losing momentum.

Luckily, WordPress has a built-in way to clear the clutter and
give yourself a clean canvas to write on.

👉 Unlock the Secret to Writing Without Distractions » 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..bEHU_cEdQ21nNUv3aoM-3I9lo9HG4fVtP9VCIlDEq74 )


Note: No plugins. No extra tools. Just a simple default WordPress
setting most beginners don’t even know exists.

Never Regret! Create an Undo Button
-----------------------------------

What if you could create an undo button for your site that lets
you travel back in time?

If a plugin update or small mistake ever broke your entire site,
you could instantly roll it back to its previous state.

But this is only possible with a WordPress backup.

Here are MANY different ways 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..Y_9rhNQDidvzoF_2IWpFWQ_v5r1tP_avjft6M-9HFmk )
 to back up your WordPress site.

Note: I know most articles provide you with 1 preferred method,
which may not be ideal for everyone. That's why we published
several methods. Regardless of your skillset, you could find a
method that best works for you :)

Add Powerful Features Without Breaking Your Site
------------------------------------------------

Backups protect you from mistakes... but what if you could avoid
risky edits in the first place?

Many beginners try to add custom code snippets by editing theme
files directly. The problem? A single typo can crash your entire
site.

That’s where WPCode ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..OARvWAM-U1q5GcQWCvSYmqS6tMxSb7tAf1jSaakiCsQ ) comes in. It’s the
safest way to add custom code to WordPress without touching theme
files.

👉 With WPCode, you can:

✅ Insert code snippets in seconds (no FTP needed).
✅ Use smart conditional logic to run code only where you want.
✅ Choose from a library of ready-to-use snippets trusted by over
2 million websites.

In other words, you get all the flexibility of custom code
without the headaches or site-breaking risks.

Try WPCode for Free Today »
